rows.label: tlk44400085_03_msg0001
rows.name:
I wish someone could reassure
me that things are going
to turn out fine...

rows.label: tlk44400085_03_msg0002
rows.name:
But I'm sure we'll be fine! His
Majesty is still going strong,
and Prince Zeke is reliable!

rows.label: tlk44400085_03_msg0003
rows.name:
Yes... Acting bright like
His Highness Zeke may
bring the best outcome.
